description: Call GET /api/v1/google/patents/search for Google SERP Patents Search through Just Serp API with query.

operations.description: Get Google patent Search data, including filters, for patent discovery and portfolio monitoring.

parameters.description: The search query for patents (e.g., 'autonomous vehicles', 'blockchain security').
parameters.name: query

parameters.description: The results page number. Use 0 for the first page, 1 for the second, and so on.
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: The number of results to return per page (range: 1-100).
parameters.name: num

parameters.description: Sorting order for patent results. Supported values: 'new' (Newest), 'old' (Oldest).
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: If set to true, results will be grouped by classification.
parameters.name: clustered

parameters.description: Whether to include Google Patents results.
parameters.name: patents

parameters.description: Whether to include Google Scholar results.
parameters.name: scholar

parameters.description: Filter by patent inventor(s). Multiple values can be comma-separated.
parameters.name: inventor

parameters.description: Filter by patent assignee(s). Multiple values can be comma-separated.
parameters.name: assignee

parameters.description: Set the target country code (e.g., 'us', 'uk') to localize results. See Google Countries.
parameters.name: country

parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.
parameters.name: language

parameters.description: Filter by patent status. Supported values: 'GRANT', 'APPLICATION'.
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Filter by patent type. Supported values: 'PATENT', 'DESIGN'.
parameters.name: type

parameters.description: Filter by litigation status. Supported values: 'YES', 'NO'.
parameters.name: litigation

responses.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing
Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded
Internal server error or upstream service exception
